recommendations.title: Monk Comes Down the Mountain
recommendations.overview: A monk leaves his monastery and ventures out into the real world for the first time in his life, and ends up in an adventure with a kung-fu master who is guarding a special artifact.

recommendations.title: Killing Me Softly
recommendations.overview: A woman grows suspicious of her controlling husband after she discovers secrets about the women in his past.

recommendations.title: Farewell My Concubine
recommendations.overview: In an epic tale of theater, gender, love and class, two Beijing opera actors navigate political turmoil as their friendship evolves over decades.

recommendations.title: The Promise
recommendations.overview: An orphaned girl, driven by poverty at such a young age, makes a promise with an enchantress. In return for beauty and the admiration of every man, she will never be with the man she loves. This spell cannot be broken unless the impossible happens: s

recommendations.title: The Monkey King: Reborn
recommendations.overview: When the irritable monkey king visits a temple together with his master Tang Monk, he feels offended because of a trifle and thereupon accidentally destroys a magic tree growing on the sacred ground. This brings an ancient demon king back to life, wh

recommendations.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin
recommendations.overview: Korean War, winter 1950. In the frozen and snowy area of Changjin Lake, a bloody battle is about to begin between the elite troops of the United States and China.
recommendations.director: Chen Kaige, Dante Lam Chiu-Yin, Tsui Hark

recommendations.title: Journey to the West: The Demons Strike Back
recommendations.overview: Tang Monk brings three disciples on a journey to the West. On the outside, everything seems harmonious. However, tension is present beneath the surface, and their hearts and minds are not in agreement. After a series of demon-capturing events, the mo

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.
